title: Spreadsheets, Python, Reproducibility, and Calculation Checks · Decision Notebook: Computation Tests
summary: Turn a hand calculation into a reusable, tested worksheet and small Python model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg computation tests increment in a reproducible calculation tool with test cases. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test normal, boundary, invalid, and independently calculated cases.
Express a unit-aware calculation as readable Python variables, functions, and output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Computation Tests evidence
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 20 units, changes by −7 units, then by +4 units. Calculate the final quantity. Use the result to decide Computation Tests for a reproducible calculation tool with test cases.
steps.why: The Computation Tests result for a reproducible calculation tool with test cases is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.
